channel.title: Blogs on Salad
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Salad

item.title: Machine Learning Semana 1
item.description: Introdução Copiei as anotações do curso do Andrew Ng de machine learning no Coursera e vou dar uma revisitada nelas pra montar um projeto pessoal. Vou adicionar algumas coisas aqui conforme for lendo. Mas é tudo tirado do Coursera salvo um post do stack overflow que ele indica no próprio curso. o que é machine learning? He says, a computer program is said to learn from experience E with respect to some task T and some performance measure P, if its performance on T, as measured by P, improves with experience E.

item.title: flow
item.description: flow phenomenology of enjoyment 1 the experience usually occurs when we confront tasks we have a chance of completing 2 we must be able to concentrate on what we are doing 3/4 concentration is usually possible because the task undertaken has clear goals and provides immediate feedback 5 one acts with a deep but effortless involvement that removes from awareness the worries and frustrations of everyday life
